name: ouronet-libs
description: Ouronet TypeScript stack — workspace root for @ouronet/ouronet-core (Ouronet protocol business logic) and @ouronet/ouronet-codex (modular React Codex layer for consumer apps). Split out of StoaChain/stoa-js in the Phase-4 reorg; the chain-level halves (@stoachain/stoa-core, @stoachain/kadena-stoic-legacy) remain in stoa-chain-libs and are consumed from npm.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@ouronet/ouronet-core && npm run build --workspace=@ouronet/ouronet-codex
